---
title: "Conclusions"
---

::: {.callout-note}
**What this project amounts to and what comes next.** Pull together the
threads — what was attempted, what was found, what it changes — and point at
the direction of further work.
:::

<!--
prompt:
  - In one paragraph, what does this project conclude?
  - What does the work change about how the problem is understood or tackled?
  - What are the natural next steps — extensions, follow-ups, open threads?
  - If someone read only the executive summary and these conclusions, would
    they get the right picture? If not, what's missing?
-->
